title: lithospermum arvense subsp. gasparrinii
intro: Lithospermum arvense subsp. gasparrinii, also known as Italian gromwell, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum arvense subsp. gasparrinii include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and protect the lungs from damage. Lithospermum arvense subsp. gasparrinii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
